title: Fabulously Perfected
description: A hybrid of Fabulously Optimized, And Vanilla Perfected With a few more mods thrown in.
body:
Fabulously Perfected is a hybrid of Vanilla Perfected, And Fabulously Optimized, with a few more gameplay mods/Resource Packs such as Fast Better Grass, WorldEdit etc.. This modpack still has the core Vanilla features in mind but with some shaders, and gameplay enhancements. There is now a minimap in the top left, and you can get a full world map by pressing M thanks to the Xaero's Minimap, and Xaero's World Map mods. There are a TON of mods to explore (and you can disable any if you'd like through the modrinth launcher).







Mod Menu helper is a part of the Fabulously Optimized modpack and can be found at: https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized
